onboarding.screen1Desc: A smart password manager that stores all your passwords in one secure place. Say goodbye to forgotten passwords!
onboarding.screen1Feature1: Store passwords for all your websites
onboarding.screen2Desc: Your data is encrypted and no one can access it — not even us.
onboarding.screen2Feature2: Your private key stays on your device
onboarding.screen2Feature3: We can never read your data
onboarding.screen3Desc: Add your first password and start organizing your digital life securely.
onboarding.screen3Tip: Tip: Use the built-in password generator to create strong passwords

reassurance.title: Your data is encrypted and no one can access it — not even us.

auth.accountNotFound: This email is not registered in the system
auth.checkEmailDesc: A confirmation email has been sent to your email. Click the confirmation link, then log in.
auth.unlockDescription: Enter your password to access your encrypted data
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.loginError: Login failed. Please check your credentials
auth.signupError: Sign up failed. Please try again
auth.unlockError: Unlock failed. Please check your password

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noPasswordsDesc: Start by adding a new password using the add button

password.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this password?
password.deleteConfirmFull: This password will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
password.emptyDesc: Start by adding your first account 🔐
password.emptyHint: Everything will be encrypted and protected
password.addAnother: Add another email on the same platform?

settings.title: Settings
settings.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to logout?
settings.logoutWarning: You will need to enter your password again to access your data
settings.secHowTitle: How do we protect your data?
settings.secHowDesc: SAMPASS is built with the highest security standards to protect your passwords
settings.secEncryptDesc: Passwords are encrypted with AES-256-GCM — the same technology used by governments and banks
settings.secLocalDesc: Your data is saved on your device first. You can use the app completely offline
settings.secZeroDesc: Your master password is never sent to our servers. We cannot read your data
settings.secSyncDesc: When syncing to the cloud, data stays encrypted. No one can see it except you
settings.secKeyDesc: The encryption key is derived from your password using 100,000 PBKDF2 iterations
settings.secLockDesc: Your data stays locked until you enter your password. No one can access it without it
settings.secCloudDesc: Each user has a completely isolated space. No user can access another user's data
settings.calmModeDesc: Reduce animations and colors for a quieter experience

sync.tableMissing: Table not created yet in Supabase. Run the SQL schema file
sync.authError: Session expired. Please log in again
